title: Trace-Driven Inference Autopilot
problem: LLM providers need lower latency/cost but do not want one-off tuning folklore.
objective: Package trace capture, replay, policy tuning, canary deployment and ROI reports as OaaS.
observations: Project history repeatedly frames OaaS/Inference Autopilot around traces, shared KV, circuit breakers, adaptive SLAs and reports.
deductions: If optimization is workload-specific, trace capture is the product entry point.
If customers need trust, before/after reports are required.
If policy changes can harm production, canary and rollback are mandatory.
abductive_leaps: Sell the control plane, not just a single KV algorithm.
minimal_test: Pilot on one customer-like workload; deliver before/after P99, throughput and cost/token report.
source_basis: personal_context/TGChat: OaaS, Inference Autopilot, KVict/CAAE product notes.

provenance.curation_note: Gold-candidate record synthesized from project-specific traces, summaries, and notes; should be human-reviewed before public release.

title: Local AI Inference Optimization Setup Product
problem: Small teams and individuals need local AI inference rigs configured for KV cache, quantization and serving without hiring an ML infra engineer.
objective: Turn local-first inference optimization into a fixed-scope paid setup product.
observations: Personal context/gmail notes mention local-first AI inference business with KV cache, context window optimization, quantization, speculative decoding and a $397 setup product.
deductions: If customers cannot evaluate research claims, sell concrete setup outcomes.
If scope is fixed, delivery can be repeated.
Therefore productize install/config/report rather than broad custom research.
abductive_leaps: Use OaaS techniques in a small fixed-price package.
minimal_test: Run package on own rig or one beta customer and measure delivery time, before/after throughput and support tickets.
source_basis: personal_context/gmail: local-first AI inference business and $397 setup product.

provenance.curation_note: Gold-candidate record synthesized from project-specific traces, summaries, and notes; should be human-reviewed before public release.

title: Private Hugging Face Dataset Deployment by Trace Type
problem: A mixed invention dataset is easier to train and manage when split into private trace-type repos with consistent schema and dataset cards.
objective: Deploy five private Hugging Face datasets matching the requested mixture.
observations: Current task requests private HF Datasets for successful inventions, failures, contradiction repair, experiment design and productization/deployment.
deductions: If categories are separate repos, training mixtures can be sampled precisely.
If raw source is excluded, privacy risk is lower.
If schema is consistent, loaders and evals are simpler.
abductive_leaps: Package as five private repos plus local bundle.
mechanism_steps: write full JSONL and chat JSONL per type
minimal_test: After upload, call repo details or list files; verify each repo exists as private with expected record count.

provenance.curation_note: Gold-candidate record synthesized from project-specific traces, summaries, and notes; should be human-reviewed before public release.
